privileged_info_summary: The task involves preparing a Business Continuity Plan (BCP) document for internal review. The source document (/home/ga/Documents/bcp_plan.docx) is a synthetic multi-page document generated using python-docx with realistic FEMA COOP template content about Meridian Financial Group. The agent must set four document properties: title 'Continuity of Operations Plan – Meridian Financial Group', subject 'Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery', author 'Diana Kowalski', and keywords 'BCP, COOP, disaster recovery, FEMA'. Additionally, a 'DRAFT' watermark must be inserted and a footer reading 'CONFIDENTIAL – FOR INTERNAL REVIEW ONLY – Meridian Financial Group' must be added to all pages. The modified document must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/bcp_plan_draft.docx without overwriting the original file.
